total_responses: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_responses FROM response;
total_anonymous: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_anonymous FROM response WHERE is_anonymous = 1;
total_not_anonymous: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_not_anonymous FROM response WHERE is_anonymous = 0;
overall_average: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.value), 2), 0) AS overall_average FROM answer a;
sections_not_used: SELECT s.section_id, COUNT(r.section_id) AS section_count FROM section s LEFT JOIN response r ON r.section_id = s.section_id GROUP BY s.section_id;
categories: SELECT q.category, ROUND(AVG(a.value), 2) AS average FROM question q LEFT JOIN answer a ON a.question_id = q.question_id GROUP BY q.category;
recent_feedbacks: SELECT r.response_id AS id,COALESCE(CONCAT(s.surname, ' ', s.given_name), 'Anonymous') AS name, f.text AS feedback, sec.name AS section, t.instructor, t.subject, r.created_at AS date FROM feedback f INNER JOIN response r ON r.response_id = f.response_id LEFT JOIN student s ON s.student_id = r.student_id LEFT JOIN section sec ON sec.section_id = r.section_id LEFT JOIN target t ON t.target_id = r.target_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
feedbacks: SELECT r.response_id AS id,COALESCE(CONCAT(s.surname, ' ', s.given_name), 'Anonymous') AS name, f.text AS feedback, sec.name AS section, t.instructor, t.subject, r.created_at AS date FROM feedback f INNER JOIN response r ON r.response_id = f.response_id LEFT JOIN student s ON s.student_id = r.student_id LEFT JOIN section sec ON sec.section_id = r.section_id LEFT JOIN target t ON t.target_id = r.target_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC;
response_per_student: SELECT response_count, COUNT(*) AS num_students FROM ( SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS response_count FROM response WHERE student_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY student_id ) AS student_counts GROUP BY response_count ORDER BY response_count;
responses_by_section: SELECT s.name as section, COUNT(*) AS responses FROM section s JOIN response r ON r.section_id = s.section_id GROUP BY s.name;
stacked_anonymous_named: SELECT 'Overall' AS section, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN is_anonymous = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS anonymous, SUM(CASE WHEN is_anonymous = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS named FROM response UNION ALL SELECT s.name AS section, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS anonymous, SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS named FROM response r LEFT JOIN section s ON r.section_id = s.section_id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY CASE WHEN section = 'Overall' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, section;
highest_rating_question: SELECT q.text as question, ROUND(AVG(a.value), 2) AS score FROM question q LEFT JOIN answer a ON a.question_id = q.question_id GROUP BY q.text ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 5;
score_distribution: SELECT a.value as label, COUNT(a.value) as count FROM answer a GROUP BY a.value ORDER BY a.value ASC;
responses_over_time: SELECT DATE(r.created_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM response r WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN DATE_SUB('2025-02-28', INTERVAL 29 DAY) AND '2025-02-28' GROUP BY day LIMIT 7;

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(day,'%b %d') AS day, count FROM ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM response r WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN DATE_SUB('2026-06-01', INTERVAL 29 DAY) AND '2026-06-01' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) t ORDER BY day;
instructor_rating_by_category: SELECT t.instructor, q.category, ROUND(AVG(a.value), 2) AS average FROM question q LEFT JOIN answer a ON a.question_id = q.question_id LEFT JOIN response r ON r.response_id = a.response_id LEFT JOIN target t ON t.target_id = r.target_id GROUP BY t.instructor, q.category;
student_response: SELECT s.*, r.response_id, t.instructor, t.subject FROM `student` s LEFT JOIN `response` r ON s.student_id = r.student_id LEFT JOIN `target` t ON r.target_id = t.target_id WHERE s.deleted_at IS NULL AND (r.deleted_at IS NULL OR r.deleted_at IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY s.surname;
all_responses: SELECT r.response_id, r.student_id, s.surname, s.given_name, s.student_number, t.instructor, t.subject, sec.name AS section, r.created_at, r.is_anonymous FROM response r LEFT JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN target t ON r.target_id = t.target_id LEFT JOIN section sec ON r.section_id = sec.section_id WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC;
deleted_responses: SELECT r.response_id, r.student_id, s.surname, s.given_name, s.student_number, t.instructor, t.subject, sec.name AS section, r.created_at, r.is_anonymous, r.deleted_at FROM response r LEFT JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN target t ON r.target_id = t.target_id LEFT JOIN section sec ON r.section_id = sec.section_id WHERE r.deleted_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC;
total_targets: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(target_id), 0) AS total_targets FROM target;
total_students: SELECT SUM(section_count) AS total_students FROM section;
SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(student_id), 0) AS total_students FROM student;
students_updated: SELECT student_id, student_number, surname, middle_name, given_name, email, s.name  as section, student.updated_at, student.updated_by FROM student LEFT JOIN section s ON s.section_id = student.section_id WHERE student.updated_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY student.updated_at DESC;
deleted_students: SELECT student_id, student_number, surname, middle_name, given_name, email, s.name  as section, student.deleted_at FROM student LEFT JOIN section s ON s.section_id = student.section_id WHERE student.deleted_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY student_id, surname;
survey: SELECT title as title, description FROM survey;
Students: SELECT student_id, student_number, surname, middle_name, given_name, email, s.name as section FROM student LEFT JOIN section s ON s.section_id = student.section_id WHERE student.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY student_id DESC;
Questions: SELECT question_id, category, text FROM question ORDER BY question_id, category;
Answers with Questions: SELECT a.answer_id, a.response_id, q.question_id, q.category, q.text AS question_text, a.value FROM answer a JOIN question q ON a.question_id = q.question_id ORDER BY a.response_id, q.question_id;
Feedback with Context: SELECT f.feedback_id, f.response_id, f.text, r.student_id, s.surname, s.given_name, t.instructor, t.subject FROM feedback f JOIN response r ON f.response_id = r.response_id LEFT JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.student_id JOIN target t ON r.target_id = t.target_id ORDER BY f.feedback_id DESC;
Teachers (Targets): SELECT target_id, instructor, subject FROM target ORDER BY instructor;
Sections: SELECT section_id, name, section_count AS `count` FROM section ORDER BY name;
SELECT sec.section_id, sec.name, COUNT(s.section_id) AS `responses` FROM section sec LEFT JOIN student s ON s.section_id = sec.section_id GROUP BY sec.section_id, sec.name;
sections_updated: SELECT section_id, name, section_count AS `count`, updated_at, updated_by FROM section ORDER BY updated_at DESC;
sections_deleted: SELECT section_id, name, section_count AS `count`, deleted_at, deleted_by FROM section ORDER BY deleted_at DESC;
sections_name_count: SELECT name as `title`, section_count AS `value` FROM section;
SELECT name AS `title`, COUNT(s.section_id) AS `value` FROM section sec LEFT JOIN student s ON s.section_id = sec.section_id GROUP BY name;
export: SELECT COALESCE(s.name, '') AS section, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 1 THEN 'Anonymous' ELSE COALESCE(CONCAT( NULLIF(su.surname, ''), CASE WHEN su.middle_name IS NOT NULL AND su.middle_name != '' THEN CONCAT(' ', su.middle_name) ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN su.given_name IS NOT NULL AND su.given_name != '' THEN CONCAT(' ', su.given_name) ELSE '' END), '') END AS student_name, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 0 THEN COALESCE(su.student_number, '') ELSE '' END AS student_number, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 0 THEN COALESCE(su.email, '') ELSE '' END AS student_email, COALESCE(t.instructor, '') AS target_instructor, COALESCE(t.subject, '') AS target_subject, COALESCE(f.text, '') AS feedback, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 1 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q1, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 2 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q2, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 3 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q3, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 4 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q4, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 5 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q5, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 6 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q6, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 7 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q7, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 8 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q8, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 9 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q9, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 10 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q10, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 11 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q11, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 12 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q12, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 13 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q13, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 14 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q14, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 15 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q15, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 16 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q16, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 17 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q17, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 18 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q18, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 19 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q19, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 20 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q20, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 21 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q21, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 22 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q22, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 23 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q23, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 24 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q24, MAX(CASE WHEN a.question_id = 25 THEN a.value ELSE NULL END) AS q25 FROM response r LEFT JOIN section s ON r.section_id = s.section_id LEFT JOIN student su ON r.student_id = su.student_id LEFT JOIN target t ON r.target_id = t.target_id LEFT JOIN feedback f ON r.response_id = f.response_id LEFT JOIN answer a ON r.response_id = a.response_id GROUP BY r.response_id, s.name, r.is_anonymous, su.surname, su.middle_name, su.given_name, su.student_number, su.email, t.instructor, t.subject, f.text ORDER BY s.name, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 0 THEN su.surname ELSE 'ZZZ' END, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 0 THEN su.given_name ELSE '' END, t.instructor;
